“你的意思是说，德克斯特·德肖恩的生意现在由你接手了？”
黑色轿车内，V盯着身旁戴着蛤蟆镜的神秘女中间人发问。
“对。”女中间人回答。
“那我凭什么相信你？”
“那你又凭什么相信那个跑路了两年又突然冒出来的黑胖子，这里可是夜之城。”女中间人嗤笑一声回答道。
“该交代给你的事情也交代过了，这单子你做还是不做？”
“为什么不呢？”V回答。
“痛快！最后，问你一个私人问题，你是想当个无名小卒，还是名扬天下？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2f56cd58b955c9548cddd674d6c52bc4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"风中怒龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7434133229596052504","book_name":"赛博朋克：高塔之下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2677人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7434133288983216664","read_count":"2677","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"493940"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"198","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2f56cd58b955c9548cddd674d6c52bc4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779289092&x-signature=Fcp8ACRdrKFb7doBHyWAf6hyvrQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2634874958395550","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"43"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212258123174A5CB33105F4DF84F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{
